hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: You raised before the cards were dealt. Your opponent called.
Flop — 9, 3, 6. You bet. Your opponent raised you back.
River — Jack. Your opponent shoved all-in without hesitation.

wrongReasons: With only one pair, 10 9 wouldn't commit chips across multiple streets. This betting line requires a genuinely made hand from the flop onward.
With only high card, 7 10 wouldn't commit chips across multiple streets. This betting line requires a genuinely made hand from the flop onward.
With only one pair, A 6 wouldn't commit chips across multiple streets. This betting line requires a genuinely made hand from the flop onward.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 3 3

Your opponent flopped three of a kind and raised the flop immediately to build the pot. Sets are too strong to slow-play — they pushed their advantage on every street.
